'''shawaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachkeeper|beachkeeper]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachkeeper|beachkeeper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shawaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæwæbæth|shæwæbæth]] || [[word:shæwæbæj|shæwæbæj]] || [[word:shæwæbæsh|shæwæbæsh]] || [[word:shæwæbæ|shæwæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shawawabath|shawawabath]] || [[word:shawawabaj|shawawabaj]] || [[word:shawawabash|shawawabash]] || [[word:shawawaba|shawawaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shawabath|shawabath]] || [[word:shawabaj|shawabaj]] || [[word:shawabash|shawabash]] || [[word:shawaba|shawaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shawafbath|shawafbath]] || [[word:shawafbaj|shawafbaj]] || [[word:shawafbash|shawafbash]] || [[word:shawafbaf|shawafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shawabatha|shawabatha]] || [[word:shawabaja|shawabaja]] || [[word:shawabasha|shawabasha]] || [[word:shawabaka|shawabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shawabath|shawabath]] || [[word:shawabaj|shawabaj]] || [[word:shawabash|shawabash]] || [[word:shawaba|shawaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shawabathal|shawabathal]] || [[word:shawabajal|shawabajal]] || [[word:shawabashal|shawabashal]] || [[word:shawabakal|shawabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shawabathatha|shawabathatha]] || [[word:shawabajaja|shawabajaja]] || [[word:shawabashasha|shawabashasha]] || [[word:shawabaka|shawabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shawabathan|shawabathan]] || [[word:shawabajan|shawabajan]] || [[word:shawabashan|shawabashan]] || [[word:shawabakan|shawabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shawabathaoro|shawabathaoro]] || [[word:shawabajaoro|shawabajaoro]] || [[word:shawabashaoro|shawabashaoro]] || [[word:shawabakaoro|shawabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
